Patch Set 3: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

(5 inline comments)

I would need to spend a lot more time to understand these patches properly, as I reviewed this quickly I noticed some minor stylistic issues that I'd like to see cleaned up as you continue to work on this.

Also, the subtasks of ORNL-1 should done as separate patches, rather than one large patch.

Patch Set 3:

It is just for performance test, the issues will be fixed in final patch.
